body:
spotted also here: https://github.com/coder/coder/actions/runs/9856429623/job/27213431086

```
=== FAIL: coderd/database/dbpurge TestDeleteOldWorkspaceAgentLogs (0.22s)
    t.go:99: 2024-07-09 11:49:21.115 [info]  pubsub: pubsub dialing postgres  network=tcp  address=127.0.0.1:5432  timeout_ms=0
    t.go:99: 2024-07-09 11:49:21.115 [info]  pubsub: pubsub postgres TCP connection established  network=tcp  address=127.0.0.1:5432  timeout_ms=0  elapsed_ms=0
    t.go:99: 2024-07-09 11:49:21.130 [info]  pubsub: pubsub connected to postgres
    t.go:99: 2024-07-09 11:49:21.130 [info]  pubsub: pubsub has started
    t.go:99: 2024-07-09 11:49:21.251 [info]  purged old database entries  duration=28.014231ms
    t.go:102: 2024-07-09 11:49:21.251 [erro]  failed to purge old database entries ...
        error= commit transaction:
                   github.com/coder/coder/v2/coderd/database.(*sqlQuerier).runTx
                       /home/runner/work/coder/coder/coderd/database/db.go:149
                 - driver: bad connection
```

I might be wrong, but if 2 tests are running at the same time, they may try to lock `database.LockIDDBPurge` at the same time, hence `bad connection`? I will disable parallel tests to see if it improves.
